backstory.original: Antrius is your classic fantasy Bard - he's a lover, not a fighter. After his supportive parents paid his way through Bard College, Antrius is out on the road trying to make a name for himself. With a glorious mane of hair and his lute, he is ready to charm anyone who gets in the party's way, friend or foe. His golden pipes bring inspiration to all who hear his song!
backstory.display: 安裘斯是经典的奇幻吟游诗人--他更偏向于情人，而非战士。热心支持的父母为安裘斯支付了吟游诗人学院的学费，此后他便踏上了扬名立万之旅。凭借一头浓密的秀发和鲁特琴，他随时准备诱惑任何挡在探险队前方的人，无论对方是敌是友。他的金嗓子能激励所有听到他歌曲的人！

description.original: Antrius attacks the enemy with the most health, causing it to take +100% damage until he attacks again.
description.display: 安裘斯攻击生命值最高的敌人，使其受到的伤害 +100%，直到他再次攻击为止。

description.original: Antrius smiles into a mirror causing it to shatter. The shards create a cloud dealing damage to all enemies within it.
description.display: 安裘斯对着镜子微笑，导致镜子破碎。碎片会产生一团云，对陷入其中的所有敌人造成伤害。

longDescription.original: Antrius takes a hand mirror out and smiles into it, causing it to shatter. Shards of glass fly out towards the enemy with the most health forming a cloud upon reaching the target. The cloud deals ongoing damage for 10 seconds.
longDescription.display: 安裘斯掏出一面手镜并对着它微笑，导致手镜破碎。玻璃碎片飞向生命值最高的敌人，在抵达目标后形成一团云。云团在 10 秒内造成持续伤害。

description.original: Antrius grants protects and buffs adjacent champions. High Charisma Champions cascade this ability on to additional Champions.
description.display: 安裘斯保护并增益相邻的勇士。高魅力值的勇士会将此技能扩散到其他勇士身上。

name.display: 最勇敢嘹亮的吟游诗人

description.original: Antrius' Inspiring Song ability is buffed for each feat owned by any Champion.
description.display: 任意勇士的每一个专长均会增强安裘斯的激励之歌技能。

description.desc: $(source_hero) inspires each adjacent Champion giving them $(amount___2) temporary hit points every $(interval___2) seconds and increasing their damage by $(amount)%. Any Champion with a Charisma score of 17 or higher further inspires all unaffected adjacent Champions, and this continues to cascade. $(source_hero)' song is so inspiring that he also inspires himself. The total shield amount on each Champion is limited to 10 times the Champion's max health.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: $target is granted $amount temporary HP every $(interval) seconds. The total temporary HP can only grant up to $optional_percent_limit% of $target's max HP

description.desc: $(source_hero)激励每个相邻的勇士，每 $(interval___2) 秒赋予他们 $(amount___2) 点临时生命值，并使其伤害提高 $(amount)%。任何魅力大于等于 17 的勇士都会进一步激励所有未受影响的相邻勇士，层层扩散。$(source_hero)的歌声太过振奋，也能激励自己。每个勇士的护盾总量上限为勇士最大生命值的 10 倍。

effect_keys.override_key_desc: $target每 $(interval) 秒获得 $amount 点临时生命值。临时生命值总量最多只能达到$target最大生命值的 $optional_percent_limit%

tipText.original: Antrius protects and buffs adjacent Champions.
tipText.display: 安裘斯可以保护并增益相邻勇士。

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"buff_upgrade,100,10794,0","description":"Increases the Damage Bonus of $(upgrade_hero id)' $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%"}

name.display: 最勇敢嘹亮的吟游诗人

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases $(upgrade_name id)'s temporary hit point bonus by $(amount)% for each Champion affected by it, stacking additively.
每有一位勇士被$(upgrade_name id)的效果影响，$(source_hero)均使该技能的临时生命值加成提高 $(amount)%，以加算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Inspiring Song is buffed based on the number of Champions affected by it. Use Charismatic champions to spread and buff it.
tipText.display: 激励之歌依据受其影响的勇士数量提供增益。使用高魅力勇士来传播和强化此技能。

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases $(upgrade_name id___2)'s damage bonus by $(amount)% for each Champion affected by it, stacking multiplicatively. Buffs apply to the pre-stack value.
每有一位勇士被$(upgrade_name id___2)的效果影响，$(source_hero)均使该技能的伤害加成提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠增益作用于堆叠前的数值。

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"buff_upgrade,70,10794,1","description":"Increases the Temporary Hit Points granted by $(upgrade_hero id)' $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%"}

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases $(upgrade_name id)'s damage bonus by $(amount)% for each feat your Champions have unlocked, stacking additively.
你的勇士每解锁一个专长，$(source_hero)均使$(upgrade_name id)的伤害加成提高 $(amount)%，以加算方式堆叠

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"buff_upgrade,100,10794,0","description":"Increases the Damage Bonus of $(upgrade_hero id)' $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%"}

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases $(upgrade_name id)'s damage bonus by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Bard in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位吟游诗人，$(source_hero)均使$(upgrade_name id)的伤害加成提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Antrius focuses on his fellow bards to power his song.
specializationDescription.display: 安裘斯专注于吟游诗人同伴，为他的歌曲注入力量。

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases $(upgrade_name id)'s damage bonus by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a total ability score of 78 or lower, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位总属性值低于等于 78 的勇士，$(source_hero)均使$(upgrade_name id)的伤害加成提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Antrius focuses on other Champions with awful stats to power his song.
specializationDescription.display: 安裘斯专注于其他属性不高的勇士，为他的歌曲注入力量。

name.original: The "A" In Chaotic Is For Antrius

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases $(upgrade_name id)'s damage bonus by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Chaotic Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位混乱阵营勇士，$(source_hero)均使$(upgrade_name id)的伤害加成提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationName.original: The "A" In Chaotic Is For Antrius

specializationDescription.original: Antrius focuses on Chaotic Champions to power his song.
specializationDescription.display: 安裘斯专注于混乱阵营勇士，为他的歌曲注入力量。

name.display: 强化阵型技能 1 - 伤害

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"buff_upgrade,100,10794,0","description":"Increases the Damage Bonus of $(upgrade_hero id)' $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%"}

description.original: Being a bard is difficult, but with a face like this, how could I not?
description.display: 成为吟游诗人并不容易，但拥有一张这样的脸，我有什么资格退缩呢？

description.original: There's no 'I' in 'Team,' but there is an 'A' which stands for Antrius!
description.display: “Team”（团队）中没有“I”（我），但有一个“A”，代表安裘斯！

description.original: Everybody sing along!
description.display: 大家跟着一起唱！

effects.description: Increases the Temporary Hit Points granted by Antrius' Inspiring Song ability by $amount%

description.original: Thank goodness I'm here.
description.display: 谢天谢地，有我在这里。

effects.description: Increases the Temporary Hit Points granted by Antrius' Inspiring Song ability by $amount%

description.original: This one's going to hurt.
description.display: 注意会痛哦。

effects.description: Increases the Damage Bonus of Antrius' Inspiring Song ability by $(amount)%

description.original: I once killed a man with 'your mum' insults. Don't test me.
description.display: 我曾经用“你妈”相关的侮辱杀死过一个人。不要挑衅我。

effects.description: Increases the Damage Bonus of Antrius' Inspiring Song ability by $(amount)%

description.original: I think of the rest of the party as 'backup vocals.'
description.display: 我认为其他团队成员都是“伴唱”。

effects.description: Increases the effect of $(upgrade_hero id)' $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: Let me handle this.
description.display: 交给我来解决。

effects.description: Increases the effect of $(upgrade_hero id)' $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: I'm a card, I go hard on lutes, flutes and guitars!
description.display: 我是个怪咖，我能把鲁特琴、长笛和吉他都弹出花！

effects.description: Increases the effect of $(upgrade_hero id)' $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: Timing and tenderness, terribly talented, topped with a bit of alliteration!
description.display: 时机与温柔，卓绝的天赋，再加上一点点押韵！

description.original: And you thought I was irresistible before!
description.display: 你还以为我之前无法抗拒来的！

description.original: Come on, sing! It will LIFT your spirits! Get it? Gods, I'm good.
description.display: 来吧，唱起来！这会让你心情振奋的！懂我意思吧？天哪，我唱得真好听。

effects.description: Increases the Damage Bonus of Antrius' Inspiring Song ability by $(amount)%

description.original: It's no vicious mockery, but it's good in a pinch.
description.display: 这不是恶意的嘲笑，但在危机关头很不错。

description.original: When it hits metal armor, it makes a perfect D-flat.
description.display: 当它击中金属铠甲时，会发出完美的降 D 调。

description.original: Swords are more Evandra's thing. But it does complete the outfit.
description.display: 剑更适合伊万德拉。但它让这套服装完整了。

description.original: Sharp as my wit! Cutting as my words!
description.display: 像我的智慧一样敏锐！像我的言语一样锋利！

description.original: They hand these out in bard college.
description.display: 吟游诗人学院里人手一把。

effects.description: Increases the Damage Bonus of Antrius' Inspiring Song ability by $(amount)%

description.original: Really, I should have used the sword to hit that goblin.
description.display: 说真的，我应该用剑砍死那个地精。

effects.description: Increases the Damage Bonus of Antrius' Inspiring Song ability by $(amount)%

description.original: I'm the star they regard as the bard spittin' bars!
description.display: 他们认为我是吟游诗人中的摇滚明星！

effects.description: Increases the Damage Bonus of Antrius' Inspiring Song ability by $(amount)%

description.original: Just to be clear, the rest of you are singing back-up.
description.display: 事先说清楚，你们其他人都是和声。

effects.description: Increases the Damage Bonus of Antrius' Inspiring Song ability by $(amount)%

description.original: This is a travesty.
description.display: 这是毁谤。

effects.description: Increases the effect of $(upgrade_hero id)' $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: You could say I'm wanted most everywhere.
description.display: 可以说全世界都想找到我。

effects.description: Increases the effect of $(upgrade_hero id)' $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: Who shall I make it out to?
description.display: 我该把它送给谁？

effects.description: Increases the effect of $(upgrade_hero id)' $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: It would look great on your mantlepiece. For those lonely nights.
description.display: 挂在你的披风上会很好看。用以度过孤独的夜晚。

effects.description: Increases the effect of $(upgrade_hero id)' $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: They stop attacks, but they don't look great.
description.display: 虽然能阻挡攻击，但看起来有点丑。

effects.description: Increases the effect of $(upgrade_hero id)' $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: Always wear protection.
description.display: 永远要佩戴防护装备。

effects.description: Increases the effect of $(upgrade_hero id)' $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: Sturdy and stylish.
description.display: 结实又时尚。

effects.description: Increases the effect of $(upgrade_hero id)' $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: Prepare to be dazzled.
description.display: 做好眼花缭乱的准备。

effects.description: Increases the effect of $(upgrade_hero id)' $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: Every bard needs a look.
description.display: 每个吟游诗人都需要打扮。

effects.description: Buffs $target' Ultimate Attack Damage by $amount%

description.original: I like to wear it open at the neck.
description.display: 我喜欢解开脖子上的扣子。

effects.description: Buffs $target' Ultimate Attack Damage by $amount%

description.original: Some fancier frills to draw the eye...
description.display: 用花哨的装饰来吸引眼球......

effects.description: Buffs $target' Ultimate Attack Damage by $amount%

description.original: How could you possibly take your eyes off me?
description.display: 谁能将目光从我身上移开？

effects.description: Buffs $target' Ultimate Attack Damage by $amount%

description.original: One moment, I need to check my smile.
description.display: 稍等，我练习一下笑容。

effects.description: Reduces the cooldown on $target' next Ultimate Attack by $amount seconds

description.original: I still look fantastic.
description.display: 我看起来还是那么帅。

effects.description: Reduces the cooldown on $target' next Ultimate Attack by $amount seconds

description.original: Well, hello handsome.
description.display: 你好，帅哥。

effects.description: Reduces the cooldown on $target' next Ultimate Attack by $amount seconds

description.original: Alllll of me! Why not take allllll of me!
description.display: 我的全身！为什么不照出我的全身！

effects.description: Reduces the cooldown on $target' next Ultimate Attack by $amount seconds
Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Female Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Human Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a DEX score of 13 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 15 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Chaotic Champions by $(amount)%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Antrius is your classic fantasy Bard - he's a lover, not a fighter. After his supportive parents paid his way through Bard College, Antrius is out on the road trying to make a name for himself. With a glorious mane of hair and his lute, he is ready to charm anyone who gets in the party's way, friend or foe. His golden pipes bring inspiration to all who hear his song!

event_upgrades.name: Can't be De-Feat-ed

original.name: Selflessness
original.description: Being a bard is difficult, but with a face like this, how could I not?

display.name: 无私
display.description: 成为吟游诗人并不容易，但拥有一张这样的脸，我有什么资格退缩呢？

original.name: Inspiring Leader
original.description: There's no 'I' in 'Team,' but there is an 'A' which stands for Antrius!

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领
display.description: “Team”（团队）中没有“I”（我），但有一个“A”，代表安裘斯！

original.name: Stirring Lyrics
original.description: Everybody sing along!

effects.description: Increases the Temporary Hit Points granted by Antrius' Inspiring Song ability by $amount%

display.name: 激昂歌词
display.description: 大家跟着一起唱！

effects.description: 使安裘斯的激励之歌技能提供的临时生命值提高 $amount%

original.name: I Bring Salvation
original.description: Thank goodness I'm here.

effects.description: Increases the Temporary Hit Points granted by Antrius' Inspiring Song ability by $amount%

display.name: 吾即救赎
display.description: 谢天谢地，有我在这里。

original.name: Heartbreaker
original.description: This one's going to hurt.

effects.description: Increases the Damage Bonus of Antrius' Inspiring Song ability by $(amount)%

display.name: 碎心者
display.description: 注意会痛哦。

effects.description: 安裘斯的激励之歌技能的伤害加成提高 $(amount)%

original.name: My Mockery is Vicious
original.description: I once killed a man with 'your mum' insults. Don't test me.

effects.description: Increases the Damage Bonus of Antrius' Inspiring Song ability by $(amount)%

display.name: 恶毒嘲笑
display.description: 我曾经用“你妈”相关的侮辱杀死过一个人。不要挑衅我。

effects.description: 安裘斯的激励之歌技能的伤害加成提高 $(amount)%

original.name: I'm a Star
original.description: I think of the rest of the party as 'backup vocals.'

effects.description: Increases the effect of $(upgrade_hero id)' $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

display.name: 我是明星
display.description: 我认为其他团队成员都是“伴唱”。

effects.description: 使$(upgrade_hero id)的$(upgrade_name id)技能效果提高 $(amount)%

original.name: Charming and in Charge
original.description: Let me handle this.

effects.description: Increases the effect of $(upgrade_hero id)' $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

display.name: 魅力四射
display.description: 交给我来解决。

effects.description: 使$(upgrade_hero id)的$(upgrade_name id)技能效果提高 $(amount)%

original.name: The Bard Spittin' Bars
original.description: I'm a card, I go hard on lutes, flutes and guitars!

effects.description: Increases the effect of $(upgrade_hero id)' $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

display.name: 饶舌诗人
display.description: 我是个怪咖，我能把鲁特琴、长笛和吉他都弹出花！

effects.description: 使$(upgrade_hero id)的$(upgrade_name id)技能效果提高 $(amount)%

original.name: Durable
original.description: Timing and tenderness, terribly talented, topped with a bit of alliteration!

display.name: 耐久
display.description: 时机与温柔，卓绝的天赋，再加上一点点押韵！

original.name: SO Cute!
original.description: And you thought I was irresistible before!

display.name: 好可爱！
display.description: 你还以为我之前无法抗拒来的！

original.name: Sky Shanty
original.description: Come on, sing! It will LIFT your spirits! Get it? Gods, I'm good.

effects.description: Increases the Damage Bonus of Antrius' Inspiring Song ability by $(amount)%

display.name: 天空小调
display.description: 来吧，唱起来！这会让你心情振奋的！懂我意思吧？天哪，我唱得真好听。

effects.description: 安裘斯的激励之歌技能的伤害加成提高 $(amount)%

original.name: Trusty Sword
original.description: It's no vicious mockery, but it's good in a pinch.

display.name: 信任之剑
display.description: 这不是恶意的嘲笑，但在危机关头很不错。

original.name: Weapon of Defense
original.description: When it hits metal armor, it makes a perfect D-flat.

display.name: 防御武器
display.description: 当它击中金属铠甲时，会发出完美的降 D 调。

original.name: Polished Rapier
original.description: Swords are more Evandra's thing. But it does complete the outfit.

display.name: 抛光西洋剑
display.description: 剑更适合伊万德拉。但它让这套服装完整了。

original.name: Dazzling Blade
original.description: Sharp as my wit! Cutting as my words!

display.name: 耀眼剑
display.description: 像我的智慧一样敏锐！像我的言语一样锋利！

original.name: Beginner's Guitar
original.description: They hand these out in bard college.

display.description: 吟游诗人学院里人手一把。

original.description: Really, I should have used the sword to hit that goblin.

display.description: 说真的，我应该用剑砍死那个地精。
